name: Green Genie Pawn Shop
description_short: Green Genie Pawn Shop is a pawn and collateral lending business located in Bethany, Oklahoma, offering loans secured by personal items and merchandise.
description_long: Green Genie Pawn Shop operates as a traditional pawn shop based in Bethany, Oklahoma. The business is located at 6600 NW 23rd St and serves the local community with collateral-based lending services. Pawn shops have operated for centuries as informal financial institutions that provide short-term loans in exchange for personal property as security. Green Genie follows this established business model in the consumer finance space. The company offers typical pawn shop services including loans secured by collateral, purchase of items, and merchandise sales. Their physical storefront operates during regular business hours, providing in-person service to customers. The specific range of items accepted and loan terms would be standard to the pawn shop industry, though detailed service information is limited in available data. What distinguishes Green Genie is its location in the greater Oklahoma City metropolitan area, serving Bethany and surrounding communities. The shop maintains consistent weekday hours (9:30 AM to 6:00 PM) and weekend availability (9:30 AM to 3:00 PM Saturday), suggesting an established operation with regular customer traffic. The business maintains a direct phone line for customer inquiries, indicating accessibility and willingness to answer questions before visiting. An honest assessment of pawn shops as a financial product is that they serve an important niche for consumers needing immediate cash without credit checks, but interest rates and terms are typically less favorable than bank loans. Customers should understand they risk losing their collateral if unable to repay. The lack of detailed service descriptions on the available web listing suggests limited online presence or digital marketing.
pros: No credit check required — accessible to consumers with poor or no credit history
Immediate cash availability — same-day funding without lengthy application processes
Consistent business hours — open 6 days per week with regular Monday-Friday service
Local Bethany location — serves the OKC metro area community directly
Direct phone contact available — (405) 470-4602 for customer inquiries and appointments
Flexible collateral options — typical pawn shops accept jewelry, electronics, musical instruments, and other valuables
No obligation to repay — customers can simply forfeit collateral instead of defaulting on a loan
cons: High interest rates — pawn loans typically carry significantly higher APR than traditional personal loans
Risk of permanent asset loss — inability to repay means forfeiture of collateral with no redemption
Limited online information — minimal details about specific terms, rates, or services available to research
Short repayment windows — pawn loans typically require repayment within 30-90 days
No credit-building benefit — pawn loans are not reported to credit bureaus, offering no improvement to credit score
best_for: Consumers with poor credit needing immediate emergency cash without qualification barriers
Individuals seeking short-term bridge loans between paychecks or unexpected expenses
People with valuable items they're willing to use as collateral for quick liquidity
diagnosis: Green Genie Pawn Shop is appropriate for consumers facing immediate cash needs who have valuable collateral and limited access to traditional credit. The main caveat is that pawn loans carry high costs compared to alternatives like personal loans, credit union PALs, or emergency assistance programs, and customers risk losing valuable items permanently.
services: Item redemption and loan renewal services
In-person customer service at physical storefront
